creator: esaradev

evidence.text: wiki). Markdown on disk, MCP-native. # icarus Agent coherence infrastructure. Local-first, markdown-native memory for AI agents. > Icarus gives agents persistent, sourced, version-controlled memory so they stop using stale facts, repeating failed attempts, and contradicting prior decisions. Built first for coding agents on long-lived codebases. ## The problem AI coding agents forget what your team decided last month. They repeat fixes that didn't work. They suggest patterns the team migrated away from. They leave no audit trail. As agents move from suggesting code to writing it, this becomes operational risk. #
